catalog_content:
Item Name: Roxy & Rich Hybrid Petal Dust Powder Food Color 8 Milliliters Volume, Rose Leaf Green Bullet Point 1: Designed for dry application using a brush Bullet Point 2: Applied by directly brushing the food, as in sugar work Bullet Point 3: Contains microcapsules of liquid color that activate upon brushing Bullet Point 4: Transforms into edible paint when mixed with water Bullet Point 5: Nut free, lactose free, gluten free, vegan, 100-percent edible Product Description: Roxy & Rich Hybrid Petal Dust Colors
Measured by volume rather than weight, since the different colors have different densities and therefore different weights

This collection is applied by directly brushing the food, as in sugar work. Hybrid Petal Dust is water soluble. It is designed for dry application using a brush. It can also be used to color most other food products. It contains microcapsules of liquid color that activate upon brushing. The collection includes colors that span the full visible spectrum.

Meets health standards of the US or Canada and/or Europe, depending on the color

Advantages:
  • Dry application
  • Highly effective
  • Matte finish
  • Transforms into paint when mixed with water

    Nut free, lactose free, gluten free, vegan, 100-percent edible Value: 1.0 Unit: Count
product_name: Hybrid Petal Dust Powder Food Color
overall_summary: Specialty food-grade coloring product positioned as a premium alternative to traditional liquid dyes, targeting professional and hobbyist bakers, confectioners, and decorators. The 8 ml glass jar packaging and brush-application method suggest a niche, artisanal use case rather than mass-market consumption. Despite its small volume, the product’s precision, matte finish, and versatility in transforming into paint when mixed with water justify a higher price point compared to bulk powder dyes, catering to users prioritizing control and aesthetic finish over quantity.
